title:
Dashboard documents data direction
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Dashboard documents data direction
Our quarterly data dashboard is a snapshot of how our work across government supports our vision of enabling better outcomes for New Zealanders.
Key pieces of work – either underway or delivered – are profiled, with each linked to one or more of our three visions of success:
- Innovation – share data and releasing open data to drive innovation – measures the number of open datasets released on data.govt.nz.
- Data-driven decisions – capability is built to ensure data is used smarter to meet priorities – measures the number of approved/in progress research project applications (opportunities to put New Zealand’s data to good use).
- Valuable data – data is managed like a strategic asset to maximise its value – measures one-on-one engagements inside and outside of government.
Each quarter we include an overview of who (or how) we’re collaborating and partnering, and showcase a particular piece of work.
The timeline documents recent activities and looks ahead to what’s on the radar.

### International connections
Our international connections reflect one-on-one engagements with governments and organisations across the globe to build our own capability and share our world-leading good practice data know-how.
- Dashboard - Q4 2017/18 - June 2018 - (PDF 1.42MB)
Check out the plain English fact sheets and other information about our data leadership role at https://www.stats.govt.nz/about-us/data-leadership/ .
Send us an email at datalead@stats.govt.nz .
